expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add audit log schema",
      "description": "As a developer, I want to add an audit log schema so membership changes can be recorded.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add audit log table/schema",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/db/schema.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add shared types for member management",
      "description": "As a developer, I want to define types for member roles and audit logs.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Define member role enum (viewer, editor, admin)",
        "Define audit log type",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/types/member.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend action to invite members",
      "description": "As an admin, I want the backend to support inviting members by email, recording this in the audit log.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint handles email invitations",
        "Membership change is recorded in audit log",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/actions/members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add UI to invite members",
      "description": "As an admin, I want a UI to invite new members by email.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI includes a form to invite members by email",
        "Form submission calls the invite backend action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/MemberInviteForm.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add backend action to change roles",
      "description": "As an admin, I want the backend to support changing a member's role, recording this in the audit log.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint handles role updates",
        "Membership change is recorded in audit log",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/actions/members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add UI to change member role",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member's role from the UI.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Member list includes a dropdown to change roles",
        "Role change is saved via backend action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/MemberList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add backend action to revoke access",
      "description": "As an admin, I want the backend to support revoking workspace access, recording this in the audit log.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint handles access revocation",
        "Membership change is recorded in audit log",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/actions/members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-008",
      "title": "Add UI to revoke access",
      "description": "As an admin, I want a button to revoke access for a member in the UI.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI includes a button to revoke member access",
        "Revocation calls the backend action and shows confirmation dialog",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/MemberList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 8,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-009",
      "title": "Add backend action to view audit log",
      "description": "As an admin, I want the backend to serve audit log records for membership changes.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint returns audit log records",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/actions/audit.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 9,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-010",
      "title": "Add UI to view audit log in settings",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes in the workspace settings page.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page includes an audit log view",
        "Audit log shows recent membership changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/WorkspaceSettings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 10,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
